overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a shallow river and exploring the surrounding grassy wilderness. The environment features rocky cliffs, pine forests, and tall grass under a clear blue sky with high-fidelity rendering.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water over a rocky stream bed, moving toward the grassy bank

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom
large light-colored rock formation in the stream
dense evergreen trees lining the left bank
tall layered rock formations in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a shallow, rocky river surrounded by dense pine forest. Large boulders sit in the stream bed while rocky cliffs rise in the distance under a clear blue sky.

events.description: exits shallow river onto grassy riverbank
game UI prompt appears offering to pick and examine a plant

agents.ego_description: walking along the grassy riverbank with the water visible to the right, approaching interactive flora

entered.detail: tall green grass and muddy bank along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the water onto a grassy riverbank, with the stream now visible to the right. Tall grass surrounds the path as the camera continues forward, and a game interaction prompt appears to examine a plant.

events.description: moves away from river into open grassland toward pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass away from the river toward denser pine trees and rock formations

entered.detail: individual pine trees growing in the grassy meadow
distant rocky outcrops and cliff faces

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the river behind and ventures deeper into an open grassland dotted with scattered pine trees. The terrain slopes gently upward toward rocky formations and denser forest, with the river no longer in view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a rocky riverbed into an expansive, sunlit grassland. It begins by wading through a shallow, boulder-strewn stream surrounded by dense pine forests and towering rocky cliffs under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from the water onto a grassy riverbank where the stream recedes to the right and tall grass begins to crowd the path. The perspective then ventures deeper into an open meadow dotted with scattered pines, leaving the river behind entirely. Finally, the terrain slopes gently upward toward distant rocky formations and denser woodland as the environment opens into a wide wilderness.
